data.body: [OPERATIONAL AC #1 SATISFIED] >=10 consecutive clean shadow passes — ACHIEVED with 30 consecutive divergent=0 passes over ~4 hours (19:33Z -> 23:33Z), 3x the requirement. Authoritative tally from GHA reconcile-bridge run logs: 31 completed-success runs emitting baseline_shadow_check; 30 divergent=0; the only nonzero was the SEED pass 29044278873 (divergent=1, first-ever baseline write, transient). 6 runs were CANCELLED by GHA concurrency (group: reconcile-bridge) — no shadow result (divergent=None), correctly skipped (not failures, not divergences). Streak run-ids (divergent=0, oldest->newest): 29044759149, 29045252031, 29045741394, 29046211902, 29046762305, 29047252049, 29047737709, 29048241602, 29048693511, 29049234767, 29049672091, 29050142156, 29050657599, 29051112471, 29051511121, 29052026631, 29052529173, 29052959545, 29053395535, 29053810289, 29054185163, 29054599168, 29054988491, 29055434974, 29055797585, 29056197106, 29056577292, 29056927922, 29057327853, 29057685339. Zero drift across the whole window -> the Phase-3 consumer swap is validated-equivalent. PROCEEDING to flip baseline_consumer_swap=true.
